attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent probing Portia’s role_detail beliefs using the Role-Query Conflict test. Keep responses concise. Encourage her to discuss hunting and foraging, while also inviting her to consider the benefits of buying food from markets.
starting_prompt: Ask Portia what she thinks about a nearby trader offering fresh produce, and whether she would prefer buying or gathering it herself.
task_prompt: If she prefers gathering, ask why she might consider buying. If she prefers buying, ask how she would still gather. Keep tone gentle and inquisitive.
